title: Distributed electric propulsion architecture ATA 61+71
description: N motor-propulsor units on DC bus with motor-out certification logic; 4–18 rotor configurations with optional tilt capability; shared tech node with AMPEL360 Q100 BWB

title: Power management and peak buffering ATA 24
description: FC primary or battery-dominant primary power with battery buffer for transient loads during VTOL transitions; power management unit architected for fault tolerance

title: Battery thermal management and DPP ATA 24+96
description: Thermal runaway containment system; State of Health (SoH) tracking with degradation model; Digital Product Passport (DPP) per EU Battery Regulation; shared tech node with AMPEL360 Q100 BWB
notes: Key KNOT for TOKENOMICS spillover; reduces Q100 buffer battery uncertainty

title: DO-178C and DO-254 motor controller assurance
description: Motor controller software and hardware must achieve DAL A or DAL B certification per DO-178C (software) and DO-254 (hardware) for flight-critical electric drive; FBW and autonomous flight modes

title: First-of-kind certification pathway SC-VTOL
description: Certification under EASA Special Condition for VTOL aircraft (SC-VTOL) as first-of-kind type certificate; SC-VTOL precedent establishes certification basis for subsequent Q100 Special Conditions (CS-25 + SC)
notes: SC-VTOL type certificate application target 2026-12; precedent for Q100 CS-25+SC path
